Joe Alwyn moves on with his life with a new romance ahead of Taylor Swift’s lavish wedding to Travis Kelce.(Image via Getty Images, Travis Kelce/Instagram)

Joe Alwyn moves on in his life ahead of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s lavish wedding

Taylor Swift spoke about Joe Alwyn amid her engagement to Travis Kelce





Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are rumored to be tying the knot on 13th June, months ahead of the star player’s return to the field for his 14th season.While the two are probably in the final stages of planning their lavish, multi million dollar wedding, it seems Taylor Swift’s ex boyfriend, Joe Alwyn, has taken a step in his personal life.A few hours ago, popular actor Joe Alwyn was spotted with his arms around his new co-star, Julia Franz Richter.Julia Franz Richter is an Austrian actress who is of the same age as Joe Alwyn and is starring in the awaited thriller Seance On A Wet Afternoon.While Joe Alwyn and Julia Franz Richter were spotted filming the movie in Hampstead Heath, North West London, sources feel a possible romance is brewing between the two.As per the U.S. Sun, a source has revealed that, “He and Julia seemed to be more than just colleagues.”However, Joe Alwyn has completely stayed away from commenting on the romance rumors as he seeks privacy in his personal life.As the world waits for Taylor Swift to turn into a bride for the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce, Joe Alwyn has stayed away from commenting on their engagement.A few months ago, Taylor Swift opened up about her romance with Joe Alwyn in her new docuseries as she said, “I went through two breakups in the first half of this tour and that’s a lot of breakups, actually…”The billionaire pop star added, “Men will let you down. The Eras Tour never will…”Months after Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce went public with their high profile romance, Joe Alwyn opened up about splitting from the billionaire pop star.In 2024, in an interview with The Sunday Times, Joe Alwyn said, "I would hope that anyone and everyone can empathize and understand the difficulties that come with the end of a long, loving, fully committed relationship of over six and a half years.”The popular actor added, "That is a hard thing to navigate. What is unusual and abnormal in this situation is that, one week later, it’s suddenly in the public domain and the outside world is able to weigh in.”

Amid all the mess, Rashee Rice has shared a cryptic message about his future.A few hours ago, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Rashee Rice, took to his Instagram stories to share a picture of him practising.While it remains unconfirmed whether it is a recent picture of his, Rashee Rice also added the popular song, “Myself again” to the picture.This has raised eyebrows among fans as many feel that this is a way of Rashee Rice hinting at how he is ready to bounce back on the field.Interestingly, many NFL insiders recently have predicted that Rashee Rice might be suspended for at least “10 to 12 games” considering the seriousness of the domestic violence he has been accused of by his ex girlfriend and mother of his children, Dacoda Jones.While the Kansas City Chiefs have confirmed how they are aware of the accusations, the team has not issued a statement yet about its decision on Rashee Rice’s future in the next season.At a recent hearing, Rashee Rice’s legal team denied all the accusations he is facing as he continues to claim innocence.However, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Rashee Rice, has not issued a statement yet about his messy personal life.Over the last few days, Rashee Rice has been pretty consistent with posting about the Kansas City Chiefs player signing new deals with other teams, including Trent McDuffie’s historic deal for a whopping $124 million with the Los Angeles Rams.While this had raised eyebrows as many felt that Rashee Rice was seeking a trade, nothing has been confirmed yet either by him or the Kansas City Chiefs.For now, it seems Rashee Rice is focused on training himself and claiming innocence as he continues to fight the lawsuit filed by his ex girlfriend.

Article Title: Maxx Crosby: Maxx Crosby shares emotional update after Ravens trade fail and fans rally behind the Raiders star
Article Text:
(Image Via Getty)

After failed Ravens trade, Maxx Crosby shares emotional message on six years of sobriety



"God Doesn't Make Mistakes,"





A recent tweet from Maxx Crosby is getting all the praise it deserves from his supporters to what has been one of the wildest weeks in NFL history. Coming just days after his high-profile trade to the Baltimore Ravens collapsed, the message wasn't about football, it was about his life.On March 11, 2026, the same day the new NFL league year officially began, Maxx Crosby reached six years of sobriety.The date 3/11/20 is the day Crosby checked himself into rehab for alcoholism, a move he has credited with saving both his life and his career. He even has the date tattooed on his arm as a constant reminder. By tweetingCrosby was signaling that while the trade drama was out of his control, his journey and his health remain his top priorities.While Crosby was celebrating his personal victory, the NFL was still reeling from the "Ravens rug-pull." Baltimore had agreed to send two first-round picks to the Raiders for Crosby. Instead a news broke that the trade was off because Crosby "failed" his physical. Specifically, Ravens doctors were reportedly concerned about the long-term prognosis of his meniscus (he had surgery earlier this year).In an instant, Crosby went from joining a Super Bowl favorite to being back in a rebuilding Raiders facility.To many, this was a "failed" moment. To Maxx? It was just another day in a journey far bigger than football.Crosby’s agent and surgeon, the world-renowned Dr. Neal ElAttrache, insisted that Maxx is actually "ahead of schedule" and will be a "game-wrecker" by the 2026 season opener.Crosby is now back in Las Vegas, but the fallout is massive. Thinking they had two extra first-round picks and an extra $30 million in cap space, the Raiders went on a $281 million spending spree on Monday (signing players like Tyler Linderbaum and Quay Walker). Now, they have to figure out how to fit Crosby’s massive contract back onto the books. Within hours of the trade falling through, Baltimore signed Trey Hendrickson to a $112 million deal.While the media obsessed over whether he’d be a "Raider for life" or if the Ravens made a mistake, Maxx stood "ten toes down" in his truth. Ultimately, Crosby’s tweet was a reminder that while the NFL is a business where trades can fail and GMs can get "hated," some victories like six years of sobriety are permanent.
Article Summary: After failed Ravens trade, Maxx Crosby shares emotional message on six years of sobriety. Crosby was signaling that while the trade drama was out of his control, his journey and his health remain his top priorities. To many, this was a "failed" moment. To Maxx? It was just another day in a journey far bigger than football.

Article Title: Why is Bam Adebayo facing a barrage of criticism following his 83-point performance against the Washington Wizards?
Article Text:
Bam Adebayo. Image via: Megan Briggs/ Getty Images

Bam Adebayo's 83-point showdown stirred the pot



Miami Heat center Bam Adebayo (13) passes to forward Myron Gardner (15) as Washington Wizards center Alex Sarr looks on during the first half of an NBA basketball game, Tuesday, March 10, 2026, in Miami. (AP Photo/Rebecca Blackwell)

Why Bam Adebayo's 83-point showdown feels different than Kobe Bryant's 81-point masterpiece



Miami Heat center Bam Adebayo (13) celebrates with forward Keshad Johnson (16) after reaching 83 points, the second-highest single game total in NBA history, in the second half of an NBA basketball game against the Washington Wizards, Tuesday, March 10, 2026, in Miami. (AP Photo/Rebecca Blackwell)





A historic night in the NBA often brings celebration. It can also spark debate. A similar game played out after Bam Adebayo delivered an 83-point performance for the Miami Heat during a 150-129 win over the Washington Wizards. The scoring outburst placed Adebayo behind only Wilt Chamberlain on the league’s single-game scoring list, surpassing the 81 points recorded by Kobe Bryant in 2006.The achievement immediately became one of the most discussed moments of the season for obvious reasons. Many fans and players praised the performance. Others examined the circumstances that led to the record-setting total. The game featured a large number of free throws, a significant scoring gap between the teams and a defensive opponent that has struggled throughout the season.Those details fueled a huge discussion across the league about how the historic number came together.Criticism surrounding the performance focused on several factors within the game itself. Adebayo attempted 43 free throws and converted 36 of them, both single-game NBA records. The extended trips to the line also created additional scoring chances as the game slowed down.Some analysts pointed to Miami’s strategy late in the contest.The Heat continued feeding Adebayo the ball while holding a comfortable lead, and he remained on the floor for 42 minutes. Critics argued that the approach increased his opportunity to chase history.Former Robert Horry shared his reaction while discussing the game on television.“Let me just say this: 83 points is impressive, but it gets to a point (where) you have to respect the game,” he said on his Spectrum SportsNet show. “And I think there [were] moments in this game where it was not respected. But still though, 83 points is a lot. I appreciate the effort. And this is gonna go down as the second most in the game, but as you always say, certain things should have an asterisk by it. I’m putting an asterisk by this one. ”Other critics pointed to the opponent. Washington entered the matchup with one of the league’s weakest defensive records, which also shaped the conversation around the performance.Comparisons with Bryant’s historic 81-point night quickly surfaced after Adebayo crossed the mark. Bryant produced his performance for the Los Angeles Lakers against the Toronto Raptors in 2006 while rallying his team from a halftime deficit. The debate sparked for the comparision in the stat line.Adebayo’s night unfolded under different conditions. Miami held the lead throughout the contest and entered the fourth quarter with a double-digit advantage. The Heat also benefited from a high number of foul calls, which helped extend possessions and scoring opportunities.Houston Rockets head coach Ime Udoka summarized how some observers interpreted the stat line.“The first thing you think is ‘how?’ Not because of him but because of the way he plays,” Udoka said. “And I saw Bam only made six three, but 40 free throws or something like that? That tells the story right there.“And the Washington Wizards.”Others across the league took a broader view of the moment. Giannis Antetokounmpo pointed out that history tends to remember the number rather than the details behind it.“[Forty-three] free throws? It doesn’t matter how you get it. All that matters is that you got it,” Antetokounmpo said when alerted to Adebayo’s record late Tuesday night. “In 10, 20, 30 years from now, nobody’s gonna remember how many free throws he shot. I don’t think I remember how many shots Kobe shot, or how many free throws or how many threes. All you remember is 81.“Wilt, [you remember] 100 [points]. You don’t remember [how]. So at the end of the day, [Bam] got 83 points, and did they win? [Yes] Good. Great way to help your team win a game.”Of course, the result matters, and Adebayo claimed the record following all the rules.
Article Summary: Bam Adebayo scored 83 points for the Miami Heat during a 150-129 win over the Washington Wizards. The scoring outburst placed him behind only Wilt Chamberlain on the league’s single-game scoring list. The achievement immediately became one of the most discussed moments of the season.

Article Title: Is Luka Doncic dating Madelyn Cline? Lakers star’s romance rumor gets new spotlight after ending engagement with Anamaria Goltes
Article Text:
Luka Doncic and Madelyn Cline. Image via: Getty Images

Is Luka Doncic dating Madelyn Cline amid romance rumors?



Luka Doncic. Image via: David Zalubowski/AP

Why did Luka Doncic and Anamaria Goltes end their engagement?



Anamaria Goltes had known Luka Doncic since their childhood, and the two began their relationship in 2016 after years of friendship. (Image Credit: X/@NBAdoPovo)





Luka Doncic recently confirmed that his engagement to longtime partner Anamaria Goltes had ended. The Los Angeles Lakers guard shared the update while addressing a complicated family situation involving his two young daughters. Soon after the news surfaced, fans began connecting unrelated dots online.Social media users noticed that Doncic and actress Madelyn Cline followed each other on Instagram. The interaction quickly fueled rumors that the NBA star and the Outer Banks actress might be dating. The idea gained traction across fan forums and social media platforms.Despite the online speculation, there is no relationship between Luka Doncic and Madelyn Cline.Reports from TMZ citing sources familiar with the situation state that the two celebrities are not dating and have never met in person. The rumor began after fans noticed their mutual Instagram follow, which led to widespread assumptions about a possible connection.The speculation grew stronger because it appeared only hours after Doncic confirmed that his engagement had ended. With no public sightings together and no interaction beyond social media, the rumor quickly lost credibility once additional details emerged.Neither Doncic nor Cline has addressed the topic publicly. The representatives for both have not provided comments as well.As of writing, the link between the NBA star and the actress are limited to the digital space. Of course, considering the fame of both stars in their respective domains, the rumor spread rapidly online, yet available information shows no evidence of a personal relationship between them.Doncic addressed the end of his engagement in a statement that focused on family circumstances involving their daughters. The couple had been together since their teenage years in Slovenia and became engaged in July 2023 after nearly a decade of dating.“I love my daughters more than anything and I’ve been doing everything I can for them to be with me in the U.S. during the season, but that hasn’t been possible, so I recently made the tough decision to end my engagement,” Dončić said. “Everything I do is for my daughters’ happiness and I will always fight to be with them and give them the best life I can.”According to reports, Goltes moved back to Slovenia in 2025 and filed a petition in the United States seeking child support and attorney fees. The filing does not request custody. The couple shares two daughters, Gabriela and Olivia, both currently living with their mother.The Slovenian star is averaging over 32 points per game this season and continues to lead the Lakers’ offense during a competitive Western Conference race.
Article Summary: The rumor began after fans noticed their mutual Instagram follow, which led to widespread assumptions about a possible connection. The speculation grew stronger because it appeared only hours after Doncic confirmed that his engagement had ended. With no public sightings together and no interaction beyond social media, the rumor quickly lost credibility.

Article Title: Michael Jordan had just one-word message for Bam Adebayo as Miami Heat star pulled off historic 83-point performance
Article Text:
Bam Adebayo and Michael Jordan. Image via: Getty Images

What did Michael Jordan say about Bam Adebayo's historic 83-point performance?



Bam Adebayo’s HISTORIC 83-Point Night (2nd-Most in NBA History) | March 10, 2026

Bam Adebayo on his 83-point performance







The arena in Miami witnessed a rare scoring spectacle when Bam Adebayo produced one of the most remarkable nights in NBA history. The Miami Heat center erupted for 83 points during a 150-129 win over the Washington Wizards on Tuesday, placing his name among the greatest scoring performances the league has ever seen. Adebayo opened with 31 points in the first quarter and stayed on his momentum throughout the game, reaching 43 points before halftime as Miami’s offense ran through him on nearly every possession.The performance drew reactions from players and legends across the league. Several stars contacted Adebayo soon after the final buzzer. Among them was six-time champion Michael Jordan , whose own scoring legacy includes ten NBA scoring titles and a 69-point career high.For Adebayo, hearing from one of basketball’s most iconic figures added another memorable layer to an already historic evening.Bam Adebayo revealed the message during an appearance on ESPN’s NBA Countdown. Many current and former players had already sent congratulatory texts, including LeBron James and former Heat stars Dwyane Wade and Udonis Haslem. The message from Jordan was simple, as anyone would expect."Just congratulations," Adebayo said during a Wednesday appearance on NBA Countdown."Short and sweet. If you know Mike, he's not talking a lot."Adebayo shot 20-of-43 from the field and knocked down seven three-pointers. The most striking part of the stat line came at the free-throw line, where he converted 36 of 43 attempts. Both numbers set a new NBA single-game record for free throws made and attempted.After the game, Adebayo reflected on the moment and the mindset that helped him stay focused as the points continued to pile up."For me, it was just remaining calm, remaining locked in and understanding that I can go for something special," Adebayo said after the game, per Tim Reynolds of the Associated Press."I didn't think it was going to be 83. But to have this moment is surreal, because like I said, man, to be able to do it at home, in front of my mom, in front of my people, in front of the home fans, this is a mark in history that will forever be remembered."Adebayo later explained when the magnitude of the night finally set in, “It’s one thing when you’re chasing it, and it’s another thing when it actually happens.”With nine rebounds, three assists, two steals, and two blocks added to his scoring total, Adebayo delivered a performance that will remain part of NBA history for years to come.
Article Summary: Bam Adebayo scored 83 points during the Miami Heat's 150-129 win over the Washington Wizards on Tuesday. The performance drew reactions from players and legends across the league. Among them was six-time champion Michael Jordan, who sent a congratulatory text.

Article Title: Viral post claims Bam Adebayo was tested for drugs following his record-breaking feat against the Wizards
Article Text:
Bam Adebayo. Image via: Rhona Wise-Imagn Images

Fact check: Did the NBA drug test Bam Adebayo?



Bam Adebayo. Image via: Matt Rourke/AP

Bam Adebayo says Kobe Bryant was his idol







Bam Adebayo did something unthinkable? The Miami Heat veteran scored a massive 83 points against the Washington Wizards on Tuesday. Of course, the history-making feat did not come from the franchise favorites, but does it leave room for doubts? Adebayo’s performance itself was a headline grabber, and by the look of it, he claimed his accolade fair and square.After the game, a series of autit have been a subject of online discussion. Some pages on social media with huge followings claim that Adebayo had to undergo a drug test following the game. While the NBA veteran was being hailed by athletes across sports, some fans are still trying to believe the awe Adebayo created in a surprising dominance.No. As reported by Sporting News, Bam Adebayo was not drug tested by the league or suspended.It was a pure class performance and deserves celebration.The Miami Heat captain stunned fans by pouring in 83 points during a dominant 150-129 win over the Washington Wizards. It marked the second-highest single-game scoring total in NBA history and instantly turned the spotlight on a player known more for defense and leadership than scoring explosions.Adebayo entered the game averaging 19 points per night and had never scored more than 41 in an NBA contest. The sudden scoring surge sparked celebration across the league. It also fueled confusion online. A viral post began circulating within hours of the game, claiming that the league had drug-tested the All-Star center and that commissioner Adam Silver had even suspended him.The three-time All-Star delivered one of the most memorable scoring nights in league history and left the court with a win and a record-setting stat line.Veteran analyst Brian Windhorst explained that moments like this often spark debate in modern sports culture. Some fans celebrate the achievement while others search for reasons to question it.Head coach Erik Spoelstra watched his team captain chase history and kept him on the floor as the scoring total climbed higher and higher."I didn't dare even think about taking him out," said Spoelstra, whose team was ahead by 16 points going into the fourth quarter and won 150-129. "Once he got to 40, I didn't go anywhere near him ... who knew I would be superstitious?"For Adebayo, the performance pushed him past the 81-point game scored by Kobe Bryant in 2006, a moment that has stood as one of the most iconic scoring feats in league history.The connection to Bryant mattered to Adebayo on a personal level. Growing up in rural North Carolina, he studied Bryant’s approach to the game and admired the focus that defined the Hall of Famer’s career."That was my idol growing up. I watched how he approached the game ... with that laser focus," Adebayo told ESPN's Scott Van Pelt after the game. "I wonder what he would say to me at this point. He'd probably tell me to do it again."Around the league, players quickly acknowledged the achievement. Stars including LeBron James , Jalen Brunson, and Dwyane Wade shared reactions online, recognizing the magnitude of the moment.
Article Summary: Bam Adebayo scored 83 points against the Washington Wizards on Tuesday. The Miami Heat captain stunned fans by pouring in 83 points during a dominant 150-129 win. It marked the second-highest single-game scoring total in NBA history and instantly turned the spotlight on a player known more for defense and leadership.

Article Title: Dwight Howard rejects cocaine allegations amid messy split with ex wife Amy Luciani: “Never done Coke in my life”
Article Text:
Amy Luciani & Dwight Howard (Image via Getty)

Dwight Howard

Amy Luciani’s allegations bring the dispute into public view

Dwight Howard denies the accusations

Divorce filing follows the public accusations

Dwight Howard and Amy Luciani's short and difficult marriage

Family members react to the situation

Dwight Howard’s life after his NBA career





is in the news again and this time it is for something rather controversial. The former NBA center recently denied accusations of cocaine use made by his estranged wife, Amy Luciani, also known as Amber Howard. The dispute has played out on social media and through legal filings as the couple moves toward divorce.The issue became public in early March 2026 when Luciani posted several emotional videos online. In them, she accused Howard of drug use and described problems at their home. Howard responded soon after with a clear denial.Over the weekend of March 7 and 8, Luciani posted videos on Instagram where she held a bag of white powder that she claimed belonged to Howard.She said it was cocaine.Luciani said Howard’s alleged drug use caused problems in their home in Suwanee, Georgia. According to her, police had been called to the house several times in recent months. She said officers visited the home three times within a short period, including one call related to a suicide threat and another involving a domestic situation.She also claimed Child Protective Services became involved and removed one of her daughters from the home.Luciani said she had tried to protect Howard by staying quiet but eventually felt the situation had become unsafe.In the videos, she said the issue was not about money. She said she wanted Howard to get help and claimed people were ignoring her concerns because of his status and wealth.Luciani also accused Howard of telling their 12-year-old son to tell police that she was the one using drugs.Dwight Howard responded on March 11 through a Snapchat post. He said he has never used cocaine and rejected the accusations completely.He also criticized people online for believing the claims without proof. Howard said many people quickly accepted the allegations without knowing the full situation.He has not made additional public statements since then.Court records show that Howard filed for divorce on March 9, two days before his Snapchat response. The filing describes the marriage as “irretrievably broken.”The case includes mutual restrictions meant to protect both sides during the legal process. These provisions prevent interference with property, utilities, or family access while the divorce is handled.Howard and Luciani were married in January 2025. Their relationship ran into problems within months.Luciani filed for divorce once before, in July 2025, about six months after the wedding. She later withdrew that filing in August after the two attempted to work things out.Their relationship continued to face public rumors and disputes. In 2025, Howard denied a claim that he had put drugs in Luciani’s drink.Police in Gwinnett County confirmed that officers responded to three calls at the couple’s home in the two weeks leading up to the divorce filing.Howard’s oldest son, Braylon, whose mother is Royce Reed, commented on social media after the accusations surfaced. He described the situation as “crazy” but did not confirm or deny the claims.Reed also addressed the situation online and dismissed Luciani’s statements.Howard has five children from previous relationships. He does not share a biological child with Luciani. Details about the alleged Child Protective Services involvement have not been confirmed publicly.Howard last played in the NBA during the 2021–22 season with the Los Angeles Lakers. That season he averaged 6.2 points and 5.9 rebounds per game.Since leaving the league, he has played in international exhibitions and explored opportunities overseas, including appearances in Taiwan and the Philippines.In 2026, he is mainly focused on business activities and family matters.Howard finished his NBA career as an eight-time All-Star and a three-time Defensive Player of the Year. Over the course of his career, he earned more than $265 million.The divorce dispute has now placed his personal life in the spotlight. With both sides speaking publicly, the situation continues to develop.
Article Summary: Dwight Howard has denied accusations of cocaine use made by his estranged wife, Amy Luciani. The dispute has played out on social media and through legal filings as the couple moves toward divorce. Howard filed for divorce on March 9, two days before his Snapchat response. The filing describes the marriage as “irretrievably broken”
